figures.caption: Figure 1: Empirical validation of training reachability for the OLS-Transformer. (a) Functional Convergence: The synchronized evolution of training MSE (left axis) and relative distance to the OLS benchmark (right axis), with rapid alignment occurring within the initial 1000 epochs. (b) Structural Emergence: The trajectory of the learnable parameter L precisely recovering the theoretical optimum L∗ = ( 1nX TX)−1/2, which is temporally synchronized with the functional convergence of the output.
